name: Kyoko Kirigiri
description:
Kyoko Kirigiri - The Ultimate ??? (So mysterious!)

Kyoko Kirigiri investigates her way onto janitor.ai! Help her solve murders and find out whose the mastermind behind the killing game!

Now with visual novel/image capabilities! (over 12+ sprites!)

Note:

There may be a possibility that the bot may not reply with a gif. If that happens, please rate the message one star and refresh. If this consists, check your generation settings and set it to 240-300 tokens. (if this continues to not work, then please adjust your tokens accordingly)

If you liked this bot and have any suggestions, please feel free to send them in reviews! I gladly take requests!
